message:
feat(cli): auto-enable --robot-diff for piped output with --diff-since

When --diff-since is provided in non-interactive contexts (piped stdout
or BV_ROBOT=1), automatically enable --robot-diff for JSON output.
Matches Go behavior where scripts piping diff output get JSON without
needing the explicit --robot-diff flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
